title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Sharekhan Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Sharekhan Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sharekhan Global Group! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sharekhan Global Group:
Sharekhan Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan Global Group!
